C[OzzyGO: Hello I am new to go
C[Kanin: I am 20 years into go
Kanin: I can give you some tips
C[Kanin: don't make your territory too slowly
Kanin: right now you spent three moves already
Kanin: but only took one corner
C[Kanin: look at white, already took three corners
C[Kanin: so in the beginning, we want to stake out frameworks, that later solidify into territory
C[Kanin: you are doing a good job defending your territory
C[Kanin: this may have been a mistake
Kanin: because you left behind a cut at b8
Kanin: always be wary of cuts
C[Kanin: and even though you connected three stones
Kanin: they are on the edge of the board
Kanin: it's called the line of death
C[Kanin: because the stones on the edge have no liberties
C[Kanin: perhaps you can understand why it is called the line of death now
Kanin: now you did it again my friend
C[Kanin: it is not a safe place to run
C[Kanin: did you finish a game before?
C[OzzyGO: Yes I have finished multiple
C[Kanin: I think it is finished
